inputs.label: Measured Value
inputs.businessContext: The measured physical quantity (e.g., sound pressure in Pascals).

inputs.label: Reference Value
inputs.businessContext: The reference quantity for the level calculation. Typical reference for sound pressure is 20 µPa.

inputs.label: dB Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: 20 for amplitude quantities (pressure, voltage), 10 for power quantities.

inputs.label: System Gain (dB)
inputs.businessContext: Additional gain or attenuation in the system, in decibels. Positive for amplification, negative for attenuation.
